name: rubric rule schema validator accepts the legal_review_status object form per section 2.1
command: printf '{"id":"r","name":"r","description":"x","detector":"x","severity":"P1","semver":"1.0.0","legal_review_status":{"nist-csf-2":"reviewed_by:alice:2026-05-13"}}\n' > rule.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-rule-schema.sh" --rule rule.json --check legal-review 2>out.txt && grep -q 'legal_review_status_present=true' out.txt && grep -q 'frameworks_with_status=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
